message:
chore(release): bump to v0.2.41, refresh franken* / beads / toon / ftui dependency family

Dependency-refresh-only release.

workspace.package.version: 0.2.40 → 0.2.41.

Aligned pinned workspace deps with the current stable tags of the
sibling repos:

  ftui / ftui-runtime / ftui-extras / ftui-widgets / ftui-tty /
  ftui-harness / ftui-render       0.3.0 → 0.3.1
  beads_rust                       0.1.38 → 0.1.42
  toon (tru)                       0.2.0 → 0.2.2
  franken-agent-detection          0.1.0 → 0.1.3
  frankensearch-core               0.1.1 → 0.1.2
  frankensearch-embed              0.1.2 → 0.1.3
  frankensearch-index              0.1.1 → 0.1.2

Cargo.lock is regenerated in-place to reflect the new resolver output;
no transitive pins are overridden beyond what the workspace Cargo.toml
already declared.

CHANGELOG.md gets a new `v0.2.41` section summarising the dep bumps,
demotes v0.2.39 from "Latest" and promotes v0.2.41, and backfills
a short `v0.2.40` entry that was missing from the history.

No source-code changes in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

-## [v0.2.39](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust/releases/tag/v0.2.39) — 2026-04-12 **[Release — Latest]**
+## [v0.2.41](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust/releases/tag/v0.2.41) — 2026-04-16 **[Release — Latest]**
+
+Dependency refresh aligning with latest franken* sibling-repo versions.
+
+### Dependencies
+
+- Bump `ftui*` family from 0.3.0 to 0.3.1 (frankentui)
+- Bump `frankensearch-core` from 0.1.1 to 0.1.2
+- Bump `frankensearch-embed` from 0.1.2 to 0.1.3
+- Bump `frankensearch-index` from 0.1.1 to 0.1.2
+- Bump `toon` (tru) from 0.2.0 to 0.2.2
+- Bump `beads_rust` from 0.1.38 to 0.1.42
+- Bump `franken-agent-detection` from 0.1.0 to 0.1.3
+
+---
+
+## [v0.2.40](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust/releases/tag/v0.2.40) — 2026-04-16 **[Release]**
+
+Minor timestamp-normalization and attachment-badge fixes. See commits c3b26a77, 03516ddc, b1e4ddd7, 0baa17f4.
+
+---
+
